mapper.select: SELECT id, clan_zang, mem_cnt FROM clandb.cl WHERE clan_name = #{clanName} LIMIT 1
SELECT clan_zang FROM clandb.cl WHERE clan_name = #{clanName} LIMIT 1
SELECT id FROM clandb.cl WHERE clan_name = #{clanName} LIMIT 1
SELECT clan_name, note FROM clandb.cl WHERE m_icon_cnt = #{mIconCnt} LIMIT 1
SELECT clan_zang FROM clandb.cl WHERE clan_name = #{clanName} LIMIT 1
SELECT * FROM clandb.cl ORDER BY c_point DESC
SELECT clan_zang, mem_cnt, note, m_icon_cnt, regi_date, limit_date, p_flag, k_flag, clan_money FROM clandb.cl WHERE clan_name = #{clanName} LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO clandb.cl (clan_name, user_id, clan_zang, mem_cnt, note, m_icon_cnt, regi_date, limit_date, del_active, p_flag, k_flag, flag, note_cnt, c_point, c_win, c_fail, clan_money, cn_flag, siege_money) VALUES (#{clanName}, #{userId}, #{clanZang}, #{memCnt}, #{note}, #{mIconCnt}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP + INTERVAL '3600 seconds', #{delActive}, #{pFlag}, #{kFlag}, #{flag}, #{noteCnt}, #{cPoint}, #{cWin}, #{cFail}, #{clanMoney}, #{cnFlag}, #{siegeMoney})
mapper.update: UPDATE clandb.cl SET mem_cnt = #{memCnt} WHERE clan_name = #{clanName}
UPDATE clandb.cl SET clan_zang = #{clanZang}, user_id = #{userId} WHERE clan_name = #{clanName}
